MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Amber Craig, Esq., of ARMSTRONG & ASSOCIATES, LLP (510-433-1830) appearing for defendant / moving party Seariver Maritime Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT SEARIVER MARITIME INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Seariver Maritime Inc.'s motion to dismiss is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sharone L. Clisham, Esq. of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party QUINTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.

RULING:
Defendant Quintec Industries's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 2002, over 5 years ago. A hearing is required unless defendant's counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
